---
title: "GSO at Engineering Expo 2026"
date: 2026-02-15
categories: [Events, Outreach]
description: "GSO members showcased research at the Engineering Expo."
image: Images/Gallery/Engineering Expo 1.jpg
---

![](Images/Gallery/Engineering Expo 1.jpg)

GSO members participated in the 2026 Engineering Expo, presenting demonstrations and engaging with students across campus.

The event strengthened connections between geotechnical engineering and the broader engineering community.
